response.justification: Strong full-stack practitioner with 15+ years of professional experience whose current role directly mirrors the target position — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, and hands-on AI-agent and MCP-framework work. The candidate demonstrates a genuine testing culture through TDD advocacy, custom test-framework authorship, and recurring Code Kata sessions. Cloud and containerisation experience spans AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple employers. The score is held below 8 by three meaningful gaps: Nest.js is absent from the resume despite being a primary-stack requirement; Kotlin and Python are listed as required proficiencies but never appear; and no explicit mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright, though underlying testing competence is clearly present.
strengths: Direct production overlap with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React at scale, plus current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development
Demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored D-language test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organised Refactoring Dojos — signals the mindset the role requires
Proven cloud and containerisation depth: AWS CDK at Optilyz, Docker and Kubernetes cluster deployments across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js is a primary-stack requirement but does not appear anywhere in the resume
Kotlin and Python are cited as required proficiencies; neither appears in the skills section or any role description
No explicit mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright despite testing being a core responsibility — named framework experience is limited to D-language tooling
